# mailgun_smtp_credentials (Data Source)

Lists all SMTP credentials for a Mailgun domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain to list SMTP credentials for.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of credentials to return. Defaults to 100.

### Read-Only

- `credentials` (Attributes List) List of SMTP credentials. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--credentials))
- `total_count` (Number) The total number of credentials returned.

<a id="nestedatt--credentials"></a>
### Nested Schema for `credentials`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when this credential was created.
- `full_login` (String) The full SMTP login in format 'login@domain'.
- `login` (String) The login name (without the @domain part).
